headline: A Historically Cheap High Yield Dividend Aristocrat That Is a Screaming Buy for Passive Income Investors
summary: Franklin Resources (NYSE:BEN) offers long-term investors a compelling income profile because its 40-plus year streak of annual dividend increases, 4.15% yield, and quiet pivot into high-margin alternative assets give patient retirees a paycheck that compounds without requiring a single trade. The case here rests on reliability. At $31.81 with a forward P/E of 11 and ... A Historically Cheap High Yield Dividend Aristocrat That Is a Screaming Buy for Passive Income Investors
